description: Year-end closing: depreciation, tax provisions, profit distribution via voucher postings
preflight: GET /ledger/account to find asset, depreciation, and tax accounts
endpoints: Use create_voucher — all year-end entries are journal postings
Tax provision: debit 8300 (tax cost), credit 2500 (tax payable)
tips:
CRITICAL: Execute ALL bookings immediately using create_voucher. Never ask for more info if amounts and accounts are given. Parse EVERY item from the prompt and create vouchers.

FORMULAS:
- Depreciation (avskrivning): amount = purchase_cost / useful_life_years. Debit 6000 (depreciation cost), credit 10xx (asset account from prompt). One posting pair per asset.
- Tax provision (avsetning til skatt/skattekostnad): Debit 8300 (tax cost), credit 2500 (tax payable). Amount from prompt or calculate as profit × tax_rate.
- Profit distribution (resultatdisponering): Debit 8800 (annual result), credit 2050 (equity/retained earnings). Amount = net profit from prompt.
- Periodisering/accruals (forskuddsbetalt): Debit cost account (from prompt, e.g. 7050), credit prepaid account (1720 or from prompt). Amount = monthly portion.
- VAT settlement (MVA-oppgjør): Debit 2710 (output VAT), credit 2711 (input VAT), difference to 2740 (VAT settlement).

RULES:
1. Each voucher MUST balance (sum of all postings = 0). Debit = positive, credit = negative.
2. Use the EXACT account numbers from the prompt. If not given, use defaults above.
3. Create ONE voucher per logical entry (depreciation, tax, profit) OR one combined voucher — both work.
4. Set voucher date to the period end date from the prompt (e.g. 2026-03-31 for March closing).
5. For multiple assets, create one posting pair per asset in the same voucher.
